hypothesis: Using frozen, pre-trained single-gas neural networks as feature extractors concatenated with gas fractions and processed by a two-node GraphSAGE model will yield more accurate and more generalizable predictions of radial etching-rate profiles for Ar/O2 mixtures across unseen power/pressure and composition regimes than a standard feedforward network or alternative GNN architectures, with features from the penultimate hidden layer producing the best performance.
